facts: latest goal: Harden the vLLM inference blueprint operator for production readiness. This is a Tangle Blueprint that serves LLM inference via vLLM with ShieldedCredits anonymous billing. Fix every compiler warning, fix the hardcoded vLLM endpoint in lib.rs (should read from config), implement proper vLLM stderr log draining in vllm.rs, add request concurrency limiting in server.rs (max_concurrent_requests from config is defined but not enforced), fix all pub visibility mismatches, remove dead code. Add a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy, cargo test, and forge test. Add comprehensive Rust unit tests for config parsing, health/GPU detection (with mock nvidia-smi output), billing signature verification (with test vectors), and the HTTP server request validation. Every test must pass. Every warning must be resolved.

expanded goal: Harden the vLLM inference blueprint operator for production readiness. This is a Tangle Blueprint that serves LLM inference via vLLM with ShieldedCredits anonymous billing. Fix every compiler warning, fix the hardcoded vLLM endpoint in lib.rs (should read from config), implement proper vLLM stderr log draining in vllm.rs, add request concurrency limiting in server.rs (max_concurrent_requests from config is defined but not enforced), fix all pub visibility mismatches, remove dead code. Add a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy, cargo test, and forge test. Add comprehensive Rust unit tests for config parsing, health/GPU detection (with mock nvidia-smi output), billing signature verification (with test vectors), and the HTTP server request validation. Every test must pass. Every warning must be resolved. Work inside /home/drew/code/vllm-inference-blueprint. Complete the full scope to production quality. Treat review, formatting, linting, and validation as part of completion.
criterion: cargo check --workspace produces zero warnings
criterion: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings produces zero errors
criterion: cargo test --workspace passes with new tests covering config, health, billing, and server modules
criterion: A .github/workflows/ci.yml exists and would pass locally
criterion: The hardcoded vLLM endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 in lib.rs is replaced with config-driven endpoint
criterion: vllm.rs drains stderr via tokio BufReader instead of the TODO comment
criterion: server.rs enforces max_concurrent_requests from config using a semaphore or similar
criterion: work is grounded in actual repository state
criterion: completion is backed by executed checks or explicit blocker evidence
failureModes: VLLM_MODEL_NAME fallback inconsistent with VLLM_BASE_URL/VLLM_CLIENT error handling
